source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Pegs are put in a board $ 1$ unit apart both horizontally and vertically. A reubber band is stretched over $ 4$ pegs as shown in the figure, forming a quadrilateral. Its area in square units is

<image1>

image_dependency: question_text explicitly says 'as shown in the figure', so the peg locations and quadrilateral shape are not recoverable from text alone
requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the visual is central to solving
asset_registry_record.image_manifest shows a valid image exists and registry_passed=true
multi_step: solving likely requires reading the four peg positions from the figure and then computing the quadrilateral's area
the board uses unit-spaced pegs, suggesting a geometry workflow rather than direct lookup
answer_type is numeric with no choices, so the task is not simple recognition or multiple-choice elimination
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text='6', which is easy to compare against a computed result
the geometric setup on a unit grid is in principle checkable by coordinate extraction and area computation
registry_passed=true, question_present=true, and answer_present=true support reliable downstream checking

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、图像和数值答案均存在，且 asset registry passed
图像对解题至关重要，但有效图像文件已提供，因此核心语义支撑充分
可验证性较高：答案为数值型，便于后续核验
仅有题干存在 typo 风险，未构成核心语义缺失或明显不可恢复问题
